headline: 3 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks for Long-Term Investors
summary: Wall Street has set ambitious price targets for the stocks in this article. While this suggests attractive upside potential, it’s important to remain skeptical because analysts face institutional pressures that can sometimes lead to overly optimistic forecasts.

headline: Leidos Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call for May 5, 2026, at 8 a.m. (ET)
summary: Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) today announced it has scheduled a conference call for Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 8 a.m. (ET) to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results for the period ending April 3, 2026, with the company planning to issue its quarterly earnings press release before the call.
